src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Lombok's type-inferred 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: Lombok's 'val' is not part of the Java language specification; replacing it with 'var' allows the code to compile without Lombok's annotation processor or enables migration to a Lombok-free setup.
